titleStmt.title: SII 34.81: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 81. Kāmarasavalli, Udaiyarpalayam Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the north wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Kārkōṭakēśvara temple.

summary.p: Beginning portion lost. A Veḷḷāḷa of Kōṉmaṅgalam, the eastern hamlet of Kāmaravalli-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Viṟai-kūṟṟam of Vikkiramachōḻa-vaḷanāḍu made a gift of 10 kaḻañju of gold for a lamp to the Śiva temple in the village. The gift was taken charge of by some Śivabrāhmaṇas.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ytu camaittaruḷip paimpoṟ kuḻitta parikala mutalālc cempoṟ kaṟ(p) pakattēr paricciṉṉamum
Aḷavillātaṉa Oḷipeṟa Amaittup pattāmāṇṭu cittirait tiṅka ḷattam peṟṟa Ātitta vā
rattut tiruvaḷar matiyiṉ tiraiyōtacip pakkattu ḷiṉṉaṉa palavum Iṉitu camaittaruḷit taṉ Oru ku
ṭaik kīḻt tala muḻutun taḻaippac ceḻiyar veñcuram pukac cēralar kaṭalpuka viḻitaru ciṅkaḷarañci
neñcalamarak kaṅkantiraiyiṭak kaṉṉaṭar veṉniṭak koṅkarotuṅkak koṅkaṇar cāya maṟṟetti
cai maṉṉarun tantamakkāmeṉat tirumalar cēvaṭi Urimaiyiliṟaiñci Āṅkavaṉ makiḻun ka
ṅkaiyoppākiya terivaiyar tilatam tiyākapatākai purikuḻal maṭappiṭi puṉita kuṇavanitai tiripuvaṉa
muḻutu muṭaiyāḷivaṉ tiruviḷattaruḷ muḻutumuṭaiyāḷeṉa Uṭanniruppa neṭumēlākattut tirumakaḷiruntu
mātar maṭappiṭi pūtalat taruntuti Araṇiya kaṟ(p)piṟ taraṇi muḻutuṭaiyāḷivaṉ tiruvaṇimār
vattu Aruḷōṭu miruppac cempoṉ vīrasiṅhāsaṉattu tiripuvaṉa muḻutumuṭaiyāḷōṭum vī
ṟṟiruntaruḷiya kōpparakēcari paṟmarāṉa tiripuvaṉac cakkaravarttikaḷ śrīvikkiramacōḻatēvarkku yā
ṇṭu 10 4 Āvatu vaṭakarai vikkirama cōḻa vaḷanāṭṭu viṟaikkūṟṟattu brahmatēyam śrīkāmaraval
li saturvvetimaṅkalattu Uṭaiyār tirukkālkkōṭīśvaramuṭaiya māhātēvar kōyil kāṇi
yuṭai civabrāmaṇaril cciyaṉ Uṭaiyāṉum paṭṭāpiyāṉa civaññāṉa paṇṭitaṉum Ivantampi vaṭuka
nātaṉum Ivantampi tiricciṟṟampala muṭaiyāṉum Ikkuṭi Arumoḻi ciṟiyāṉum māṭalaṉ vaṭu
kaṉ puṟampiyanāṉa jeyamu paṭṭaṉum Ikkuṭi Amaranāyakaṉ puṟampiyaṉum Ivantampi nīṟaṇintā
ṉum Ikkuṭi vaṭukaṉ maruntum Ikkuṭi kūttaṉ Uṭaiyāṉum Uḷḷiṭṭa civappirāmaṇarōm Ivūr
kīḻpiṭākai kōṉmaṅkalattilirukkum veḷḷāḷaṉ kiḷāruṭaiyāṉ Ampalakkūttaṉ cīrāmanāṉa ki
ḻānāṭṭu vēḷāṉ pakkal Ittēvarkku santrātitavaṟ Iravum pakalum Eriya vaitta tirunontā vi
ḷakku Upaiyamākak koṇṭa poṉ patiṉ kaḻañcum Ivaṉ pakkal kaikkoṇṭu Ippoṉṉilp pa
licai cekuttu Ittirunontā viḷakku Oṉṟum Iravum pakalum Erikkakka ṭavōmāka Ikkōyilil tiruvaṭi
kaṭantu kuccikoṇṭu pukuntāne celutta kaṭavōmāka samatittōm Ivaṉaivōm Itu
paṉmāheśva rakṣai §
Digital edition of SII 34.81 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
